pattern: Schoolbook addition from the least significant bit: sum the aligned bits plus a carry, emit the low bit, propagate the high bit, and you never need big-integer conversion.
hints: Add the two strings the way you add by hand, starting from their rightmost characters and carrying into the next column.
At each column the running total is bitA + bitB + carry; the output bit is total mod 2 and the new carry is total over 2.
Walk both strings from the end with two indices and a carry. Append total % 2 each step; when both indices run out, append a final 1 if a carry remains, then reverse the collected bits.

edge_inputs.description: simple carry produces a new bit
adding zero leaves the value unchanged

stress.description: long random binary strings with no leading zeros, exercising sustained carry chains
stress.note: no leading zeros except a single '0', matching the constraint
